SORAMOD-CROWN_PENDANT.description: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Drive.
SORAMOD-CROWN_PENDANT.flavor: A heavy silver charm. It hums with the strength of distant friends.
SORAMOD-CROWN_PENDANT.title: Crown Pedant
SORAMOD-SILVER_CROWN.description:
At the start of each combat, draw the Drive Forms card.
 Gain 3 Drive.
SORAMOD-SILVER_CROWN.flavor:
A Heavy Crown that can be strengthened yet.
Defeat 5 more Elites to upgrade the crown further.
SORAMOD-SILVER_CROWN.title: Silver Crown
SORAMOD-BRONZE_CROWN.description:
At the start of each combat, draw the Drive Forms card.
 Gain 3 Drive.
SORAMOD-BRONZE_CROWN.flavor:
A Crown fit for those with greater ambitions.
Defeat 5 Elites to upgrade the crown.
SORAMOD-BRONZE_CROWN.title: Bronze Crown
SORAMOD-DONALD.description: At the end of your turn, play a random [purple]Magic[/purple] card from your discard pile.
SORAMOD-DONALD.flavor: Known to unleash devastating elemental fury just moments after you desperately needed healing.
SORAMOD-DONALD.title: Donald Duck
